summary: Tested Devasaya backend (12 pytest tests) + frontend critical flows (home, shop+filters, product detail with WhatsApp CTA, journal, contact form, admin product/journal create). All tests pass.

issues: DEVASAYA wordmark slightly overlaps the 'HOME' nav link on desktop (visible in screenshots) — z-index/positioning needs adjustment

action_items: Minor: fix logo/HOME link overlap in /app/frontend/src/components/Layout.jsx header
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — migrate to lifespan handlers in future
Admin routes have no authentication (intentional per agent note), but should be gated before production
Newsletter idempotency works by returning existing record — good; consider returning HTTP 200 vs 201 distinction explicitly
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id with projection {'_id': 0}
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 8 products + 4 journal posts on startup; verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_devasaya_api.py (pytest, 12 tests, all passing). Frontend testids: filter-{sarees|dupattas|fabrics|kaftans|all}-btn, product-card-{id}, featured-product-{id}, contact-{name|email|phone|message}-input, contact-submit-btn, admin-product-{name|category(SELECT)|price|fabric|description|images|featured|submit}, admin-tab-journal, admin-journal-{title|category(SELECT)|cover|excerpt|body|submit}.
